title: Wynntils
description: Wynntils is a Wynncraft mod that seeks to enhance the user's gameplay with a variety of customizable options and additions, allowing the user to change everything in the way they want and enhancing the overall Wynncraft gameplay!
body:
Wynntils is a Wynncraft mod that seeks to enhance the user's gameplay with a variety of customizable options and additions, allowing the user to change everything in the way they want and enhancing the overall Wynncraft gameplay! ## Features

Chat - Chat Coordinates - Chat Item - Chat Mentions - Chat Tabs - Chat Timestamps - Death Coordinates - Dialogue Button Override - Transcribe Sent Messages - Message Filter - Remove Wynncraft Chat Wrap - Reveal Nicknames

Combat - Abbreviate Mob Health - Auto Attack - Chest Blocker - Tracked Content - Custom Lootrun Beacons - Block Inventory Casting - Health Potion Blocker - Hide Labels - Horse Mounting - Invert Attack Keybinds - Low Health Indicator - Mythic Box Item Scaling - Prevent Trades & Duels - Quick Spell Cast - Major ID Range Visualizer - Shaman Totem Tracking - Spell Cast Vignette Render - Token Tracker Bell
Commands - Add Command Expansion - Command Aliases - Custom Command Keybinds - Filter Admin Commands

Embellishments - War Horn - Wybel Sounds - Wynntils Cosmetics

Inventory - Container Search Highlight - Disable Recipe Book - Durability Overlay - Emerald Pouch Fill Arc - Emerald Pouch Hotkey - Extended Item Count - Guild Bank Hotkey - Hide Attack Cooldown - Ingredient Pouch Keybind - Inventory Emerald Count - Favorite Items - Custom Item Highlights - Item Lock - Item Screenshot - Item Text Overlays - Lootrun Chest Text - Personal Storage Utilities - Unidentified Item Icon

Map - Beacon Beam - Guild Map - Map - Waypoint Distance - Coordinates - Territory - Minimap

Overlays - Annihilation Sun - Arrow Shield - Bomb Bell Overlay - Gathering Totem Timer - Mob Totem Timer - Combat Experience - Custom Bars - Custom Player List Overlay - Awakened Bar - Blood Pool Bar - Commander Bar - Corrupted Bar - Focus Bar - Focused Mob Health Bar - Health Bar - Holy Power Bar - Mana Bank Bar - Mana Bar - Ophanim Bar - Game Notifications - Guardian Angels Tracker - Party Members - Held Item Cooldown - Info Boxes - Lootrun Beacon Count - Lootrun Missions - Lootrun Task Name - Lootrun Trials - Mantle Shield Tracker - NPC Dialogue - Daily Objective - Guild Objective - Powder Special Bar - Raid Progress - Server Uptime Info - Shaman Mask Overlay - Shaman Totem Timer - Spell Cast Overlay - Spell Inputs Overlay - Status Overlay - Stopwatch Overlay - Streamer Overlay - Token Bars - Aura Timer - Volley Timer - Tower Stats Overlay - Content Tracker
Players - Auto Join Parties - Nametag Rendering - Hades - Party Management Screen - Hide Player Armor - Transparent Player Ghost - Player Viewer
Game Notification Redirects - Ability Refreshes - Info Message Filter - Pouch Messages - Territory Messages

Item Tooltips - Item Compare - Item Guess - Item Statistics Info - Tooltip Fitting - Hide Irrelevant Tooltip Info
Trade Market - Trade Market Bulk Sell Buttons - Market Price Conversion - Trade Market Price Match Buttons - Trade Market Quick Search

UI - Bulk Buy - Container Scroll - Crafting Profession Progress Bar - Custom Guild Log Screen - Custom Loading Screen - Custom Seaskipper Screen - Custom Territory Management Screen - Custom Trade Market Result Screen - Lobby Uptime - Profession Highlight - Wynncraft Button - Wynntils Pause Screen - Wynntils Content Book

Uncategorized - Lootrun - Bomb Bell Relay - Discord Rich Presence - Extended Season Leaderboard - Send Territory Defenses - Valuable Found

Utilities - Auto Apply Resource Pack - Auto Skip Cutscenes - Character Selection Utilities - Fix Crosshair Position - Gammabright Keybind - Valuables Protection - Per Character Guild Contribution - Silencer - Skill Point Loadouts - Transcribe Received Messages - Translation - XP Gain Messages
